title: Display full Google Calendar view (all synced calendars) inside monday.com

posts.author: jonathan_sanovsky (Jonathan Sanovsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, monday.com only offers:

Sync-based integrations (events are copied into monday items)

Embed solutions that rely on public URLs

Integrations limited to the primary calendar only

I’m looking for an OAuth-based connection that allows viewing the full Google Calendar view with multiple layered calendars, without syncing or duplicating events, similar to what is available in tools like ClickUp.

This would allow users who manage multiple Google calendars to view everything in one place directly inside monday.com.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to view Google Calendar inside monday.com exactly as it appears in Google Calendar, including all synced calendars (primary, shared, and subscribed), for view-only purposes.
